name: Compile, Then Page: Executable SOP Programs and a Capability-Gated Runtime for Procedural LLM Agents

description: arXiv:2607.11346v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Enterprise agents must follow long-horizon, conditional, safety-critical standard operating procedures (SOPs). We compile machine-readable SOP constraints into executable pseudo-code and run them with a program-guided (PG) stack machine that pages the active frame while an LLM performs semantic execution. A three-arm SOPBench study across six...
author: Chenglin Yu, Li Yin, Ying Yu, Qingxin Fan, RunyangRay Zhong, Hongxia Yang, Ming Li
